title: potentilla supina
intro: Potentilla supina, also known as pinewort or creeping cinquefoil, is a perennial herbaceous plant in the rose family that is native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe skin irritations, wounds, and infections. The plant's medicinal properties have been linked to several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Potentilla supina can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
